Simulacao da Etapa 2 - Tarefa 1 (ULA de 8 bits: SLL8 SRA1 F0 F1 ENA ENB INVA INC)
Valores iniciais: A = 1, B = 1

Linha 1 (PC = 1):
	IR = 10111100
	PC = 1
	A  = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	B  = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	Sd = 00000000000000000000001000000000 (512)
	Vai-um = 0
	N = 0
	Z = 0

Linha 2 (PC = 2):
	IR = 01111100
	PC = 2
	A  = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	B  = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	Sd = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	Vai-um = 0
	N = 0
	Z = 0

Linha 3 (PC = 3):
	IR = 11111100
	PC = 3
	A  = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	B  = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	Sd = 00000000000000000000001000000000 (512)
	Vai-um = 0
	N = 0
	Z = 0

Fim da simulacao da Etapa 2 - Tarefa 1.
